testTarget.reason: ListeningMode is the largest untested core component (607 lines). All priority-list hooks (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession) and critical components (AudioPlayer, JapanesePhrase) are already covered. ListeningMode manages audio playback, question flow, speed controls, and results — all essential for the app's primary listening-practice mode.

refactorCandidate.reason: Large component with mixed UI, state management, and audio logic. No tests exist. Should be refactored after test coverage is added to safely extract logic into hooks or sub-components.

notes: All hooks (100% coverage) and most critical components are tested. The highest-value gap is ListeningMode (607 lines, untested). Secondary untested components: CountersMode (499), MemoryMode (484), PatternGraph (424), RepeatMode (321), PatternSelection (292), ExerciseContainer (244), HighlightedText (192). VoiceRecorder is now only 11 lines (refactored).
